pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in verifier.py header and task description.
Verified via sum of criteria points in verifier.py (25+20+20+15+20=100).
Verified via setup_task.sh which constructs the starter file dynamically.
Verified against the evaluation logic in export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check furniture counts, wall additions, named rooms, and polylines.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Sweet Home 3D file (daycare_center_starter.sh3d), which is dynamically generated by stripping existing furniture from a Sweet Home 3D example file via setup_task.sh. All required metadata claims, including industry context, point totals, pass thresholds, and the target starter file, explicitly match the underlying task scripts and verifier.py evaluation logic.
